reasons: All /svc/ endpoints returned 200 to same-origin fetch; no WAF/CDN challenge observed
Session is an HttpOnly cookie set at login; public /svc/shared/* needs no auth

details.note: All /svc/ responses are application/octet-stream protobuf; field maps reverse-engineered during capture
_app/immutable/* bundles; client-rendered, server-rendered HTML shells are empty

evidence: POST /svc/decks/deck-list-info => 200 with session cookie, 403 without (validated). Real session cookie is HttpOnly; has_auth is the JS-visible flag.

candidate_commands.name: info
candidate_commands.rationale: GET /svc/shared/item-info?sharedId= returns full deck detail + reviews protobuf

candidate_commands.name: download
candidate_commands.rationale: GET /svc/shared/download-deck/{id}?t= requires client-minted signed token (op=sdd); token generation unresolved

candidate_commands.name: list
candidate_commands.rationale: POST /svc/decks/deck-list-info returns user's synced decks; cookie-gated

warnings.message: All API responses are protobuf, not JSON; generated JSON decoding will not work without hand-written wire-format readers.
Shared-deck download needs a signed ?t= token minted by AnkiWeb client JS; not reproducible from captured traffic alone.
